bead.title: bench-pr-A2: bash benchmark runner core, matrix planning, execution loop, resume, and retry
bead.description:
PROBLEM: The benchmark runner still lives as the large Go matrix implementation, so PR A cannot provide the new bash entry point, no-side-effect plan mode, YAML-driven matrix expansion, or per-cell report flow. Governing artifact: plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification. Dependency ID: fizeau-163efede. Sibling dependency: expects A1 adapter and task-executor contracts to exist, but this child must include any minimal test fixtures needed to run its own tests.
ROOT CAUSE: cmd/bench/matrix.go:1 is the monolithic fiz-bench matrix implementation, and cmd/bench/matrix.go:1105 couples benchmark execution to host Python instead of a shell runner invoking adapter contracts.
PROPOSED FIX: Add scripts/benchmark/benchmark as an executable bash script. Implement dispatch for profiles, bench-sets, task-executors, harness-adapters, validate, preflight, and run mode when no subcommand is provided. Implement run flags --profile, --bench-set, --plan, --force-rerun, --retry-invalid, --reps, --jobs, --max-cost-usd, and --out. Read profile, bench-set, and concurrency-group YAML through yq -o=json. Expand profile x task x rep into a deterministic ordered cell list. Resolve tasks_from relative to the bench-set file and inline tasks lists; for PR A smoke tests default task_executor to harbor when framework == terminal-bench while leaving final schema work to PR C. In --plan mode print the matrix, create no files, and build no Docker images. In preflight mode invoke the harbor-runner image rebuild check from A1 only when the cached image-content-sha label does not match. In run mode create cell-state.json, call harness-adapters/<name> command with profile JSON on stdin, compose command-spec and task-spec, call task-executors/<name> with task-spec JSON on stdin, compose report.json with embedded profile, command, env_redacted, fiz.txt, fiz.err, session/, result, and sweep metadata, then remove the sentinel. Implement resume defaults: skip existing terminal report.json cells, --force-rerun ignores the skip, and --retry-invalid reruns cells with non-empty invalid_class or orphan cell-state.json. Implement bounded exponential backoff for transient connection refused, 5xx, EOF parse, and equivalent transient errors, writing attempt_of on the new cell and superseded_by into the prior closed cell as the only allowed mutation.
NON-SCOPE: cell-report.schema.json (PR B); final tasks_from / task_executor bench-set schema beyond PR A smoke behavior (PR C); Node collector (PR D); Node importers (PR E); deleting cmd/bench (PR F); docs beyond required local command help and existing redirect references (PR G). Do not implement budget, SIGTERM process cleanup, in-flight.json, or Go runner deactivation in this child.
ROLLBACK: If interrupted, leave cell-state.json sentinels as recovery anchors; revert only this child bead's script and test changes.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestBenchmarkPlanNoSideEffects: go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkPlanNoSideEffects and ./scripts/benchmark/benchmark --plan --profile sindri-lucebox --bench-set tb-2-1-canary print the matrix, create no files, and build no Docker images.
2. TestBenchmarkMatrixExpansionAndTaskResolution: go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkMatrixExpansionAndTaskResolution verifies yq -o=json loading, profile x task x rep ordering, tasks_from resolution relative to the bench-set file, inline tasks handling, --reps behavior, and terminal-bench default task_executor=harbor.
3. TestBenchmarkCanaryReports: go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkCanaryReports and ./scripts/benchmark/benchmark --profile sindri-lucebox --bench-set tb-2-1-canary run the canary and produce cells under bench/results/fiz-tools-v1/cells/ where each report.json embeds profile, command, env_redacted, fiz.txt, fiz.err, and session/.
4. TestBenchmarkResumeAndRetry: go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkResumeAndRetry verifies terminal report.json cells are skipped by default, --force-rerun reruns them, --retry-invalid handles invalid_class and orphan cell-state.json, transient retries are bounded with exponential backoff, new cells include attempt_of, and prior cells get superseded_by.
5. TestBenchmarkPreflightImageRebuild: go test ./... -run TestBenchmarkPreflightImageRebuild verifies ./scripts/benchmark/benchmark preflight rebuilds the harbor-runner image when the cached label mismatches and never runs during --plan.
6. TestA2Gates: go test ./... and lefthook run pre-commit pass on a clean checkout.
